fields.title: Update memory tool interface and descriptions
fields.description:
Update the memory tool parameters and descriptions to reflect new id-based API.

Acceptance criteria:
- Update tool parameters: id instead of old_text
- Update descriptions to explain id-based addressing
- Update return values (single entry vs full snapshot)
- Update tool description text
fields.close_reason: Already implemented in tau-1lv.3 - tool uses id parameter, returns single entry, descriptions updated
